---
params:
  ReferenceDataFile: NULL
  UnitCodes: NULL
  ReportingPeriodFrom: NULL
  ReportingPeriodTo: NULL
  BirthWeightFrom: NULL
  BirthWeightTo: NULL
  GestationWeeksFrom: NULL
  GestationWeeksTo: NULL
  IncludeNonCorePatients: NULL
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

{{< include content/_main.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="de"}

{{< include content.de/_main.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}

{{< include content.es/_main.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="it"}

{{< include content.it/_main.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="tr"}

{{< include content.tr/_main.qmd >}}

:::
